description_long: This is a plush, cartoon-style dinosaur stuffed toy with a rounded, oversized head and a friendly, approachable appearance. Its body is primarily green with a lighter beige belly and black, jagged markings around the midsection, giving the impression of a playful, stylized T-Rex. The toy features small, stubby arms, large feet, and a thick tail, all proportioned to enhance its cute and cuddly look. The face has large, round eyes with black pupils and a simple, closed mouth with small white teeth visible. The surface appears soft and matte, typical of fabric plush toys, and the toy is likely filled with synthetic stuffing to maintain its shape. This stuffed dinosaur would be a charming addition to urban parks, playgrounds, or as a decorative item in a child's play area.
description: A soft, green cartoon dinosaur stuffed toy with a beige belly, large head, and friendly facial features. It has small arms, big feet, and a thick tail, designed for a cute and cuddly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dinosaur's large head, round eyes, closed mouth with visible teeth, and the lighter beige belly with black jagged markings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dinosaur's profile, including the protruding snout, small arms, and thick tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and tail, with no facial features visible and a smooth, uninterrupted green surface.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, mouth, arms, and tail, with the same stylized features.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with wide, round eyes and a closed mouth showing small, white teeth. The lack of eyebrows or exaggerated features gives it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both legs forward, arms slightly extended, and head facing forward. The tail curves gently behind the body.
